description: Housing, neighborhoods, residential zoning, apartments, townhomes, condos, and related site approvals.
Retail, office, hotel, restaurant, storage, entertainment, and mixed-use development items.
Industrial facilities, mining, quarry, agricultural land use, warehousing, manufacturing, distribution, and processing.
Roads, bridges, traffic signals, sidewalks, bicycle/pedestrian projects, trails, and right-of-way.
Water, wastewater, septic-to-sewer, stormwater, drainage, utility construction, parks, preserves, wetlands, and environmental work.
Village facilities, fire rescue, schools, libraries, elections, public works buildings, and civic services.
Budgets, millage, capital improvement planning, financial reports, contracts, grants, and purchasing.
Agenda approval, minutes, board appointments, presentations, workshops, and public comments.
